top_stories.title: Fed officials were split on direction of interest rates at last meeting, minutes show
top_stories.insight: This matters because it indicates uncertainty among Fed officials, which could impact future interest rate decisions.

top_stories.title: Goldman Sachs wins $70 billion in asset management deals with Verizon, Lockheed Martin
top_stories.insight: This matters because it highlights Goldman Sachs' ability to secure large asset management deals, which could boost its revenue.

top_stories.title: Traders on Kalshi think the Nasdaq-100 will end 2026 above 30,000, predicting a cooler second half of the year
top_stories.insight: This matters because it indicates traders' optimism about the Nasdaq-100's performance, which could influence market trends.

top_stories.title: Investors Expect ‘Sunshine and Rainbows’ This Earnings Season
top_stories.insight: This matters because it highlights investors' expectations for a strong earnings season, which could impact stock prices.

top_stories.title: Treasury Two-Year Yields Rise to Highest Since 2025 as Oil Jumps
top_stories.insight: This matters because it indicates a rise in Treasury yields, which could impact borrowing costs and market sentiment.

daily_summary: The financial markets are experiencing a mix of trends, with Fed officials split on interest rate decisions, Goldman Sachs securing large asset management deals, and traders predicting a strong performance for the Nasdaq-100. Investors are also expecting a strong earnings season, while Treasury yields are rising due to oil price jumps.
